name: jarbou3i-model
description: Jarbou3i Model: a modular, client-side trilingual dual-lens workbench with expanded biopolitical systems diagnostics, strict hosted evidence archive identity/structure guards, stable browser-core worker limits, and stable-release readiness reporting.

scripts.test: npm run test:qa && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:ci:no-browser: npm run test:qa && npm run test:static && npm run test:schema && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:a11y:static && npm run test:ci:contract && npm run test:hygiene
scripts.test:browser:core: playwright test tests/a11y.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/rtl-mobile.spec.js tests/export-contract.spec.js tests/lens-import-contract.spec.js tests/systems-map.spec.js tests/cross-locale-export-contract.spec.js --workers=4
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:browser:core && npm run test:browser:hosted
scripts.test:ci:browser: npm run test:browser && npm run test:evidence:hosted
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:no-browser && npm run test:ci:browser
scripts.test:local:all: npm run test:local:split && npm run test:local:no-browser && npm run test:local:browser
